titleStmt.title: SII 18.180: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 180. (B.K. No. 58 of 1934-35.) NADIHARAḶHAḶḶI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Sōmēśvara.

summary.p: This worn out inscription refers itself to the reign of Vīra-Bijjaṇadēva, and is dated in Śaka 1090, Sarvadhāri, Chaitra Pūrṇimā, Monday, lunar eclipse corresponding regularly to A.D. 1168, March 25, Monday.

It registers a grant of land made by Arasi-gāvuṇḍi and Nāga-gāvuṇḍa to the Jinālaya constructed by the latter at Goṭṭagaḍi. The gift was made for feeding the Jaina monks and nuns. The genealogy of Nāga-gāvuṇḍa is given. A supplementary grant of money for burning a perpetual lamp to the god, made by Nāgaṇadēva is also recorded. Vāsupūjya-munīndra of the Mūlā-saṁgha, Śūrashtha-gaṇa and Chitrakūṭānvaya and Rāvaṇandi-munīndra, probably his disciple, are also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī matparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalānchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
śrīge neleyenipa ge tavarmmane nipanoldemagīgoḷpaṁ
goṭṭagaḍiya vṛṣabhajinēṁdraṁ . śrīkāṁtamenisi bharatamahīkāṁtege kuṁtaḷavena leseguṁ viṣayaṁ lō
kanutaṁ kuṁtaḷamaṁtā kuṁtaḷaviṣayamadhyadoḷsogayisuguṁ . dorevetta tuṁgabhadreya varadeya
madhyapradēśadoḷsogayisa guṁ siriya tavarmmane saukhyākaramene banavāsedēśa vatuḷaviḷāsaṁ . vanaru
ha va na di ṁ vanaruhavanamadhumuditāḷimāḷeyindaḷimāḷādhvanihṛdyōdyānadinā janapadavoḍarisu
vudakhiḷavanasukhapadamaṁ . pikaravadiṁ taṁbelariṁ śukaśatacāruprakaradiṁdeḷenīrasa tavanaruhavanadiṁ sakaḷēṁdri
yatṛpti catura�ṣayaṁ viṣayaṁ . kaḷakaradināmravanaṁ giḷiviṁḍiṁ gaḍa śāḷivana ku lalita latikāvanaṁ kaṇgoḷisu
gumadaṟoḷmarāḷadiṁ vanajavanaṁ . kūḍe sogayisuva banavasenāḍoḷkaṇgeseva kaṁpaṇaṁ vanalakṣminiṁda rūḍhiya nūṟuṁ
bāḍaṁ bhūyuvatinūtnaratnāpīḍaṁ . Ādanāḷvaṁ sakaḷajagadviditayaśaṁ śrīnikētana diyisida pāṁḍyana
maḷinahridayaṁ sauṁdaryyadoḷabhinavamadanaṁ . Ā vijaya pāṁḍya parabaḷa
vidrāvaṇa vidhānaṣauṁḍaṁ cāvuṁḍaṁ guṇakaraṁḍanoḷpinaṣaṁḍaṁ Amarēṁdra haḷḷigadhipati bhūpōttama
nuttamapuruṣa pāṁḍyamahipa dharegeseva tuṁga bhadrā parikhākṛtiyāgi sutte suttuṁ
pudidāvarisida naṁdanavanadiṁ karamesevudu goṭṭagaḍi pasarise sarasīruhapaṁ
ḍamaṁḍitaṁ navanavamāḷikā paṭpadi
gavavṛtamappagoṭṭagaḍigēṁ paḍiyakku bhūmi le
yerenitanituṁ nirmmaḷajainadharmmapararuḷida ṁyama nirata vallivē
llitadigaṁtarāḷa kalla nikētanani satyada
bittu bhōgadāgara vasu kētagāvuṇḍa Ātana vadhu śīḷaguṇō
pēte jagakhyāte sīteyene pesarvaḍedaḷ bhūtaḷadoḷ lōkave liyoḷ .
[Aṁga] vikrāṁta
vaṁdu bēḍidoḍe vaṟiya
gārmmanenipaṁ barmma Ene negaḷdabarmmagavuṁḍana sati guṇavati vi vaniteya
roḷagarasiyeṁba pesaresevina rasiya
kkaṁ bhūtaḷadoḷmigilenippa permme janiyisida moḷpi
na rāśi kētagāvuṁḍanumene pesa taḷamana rpparahi
tōdyōgaṁ jinapūjā prasaṁga
ptāgamānvayavartthibrajarakṣa saka
maṁ sāmanta nāgaṁ guṇāśrayane dīkṣākṣama maṁgaḷā
nakaravaṁ jainābhiṣēkārcanādi satast[Ōtrāvaḷi] nākarana jinabhaktaprakara jaina
bratāśaṁsanavaniyoḷ nityavinōdaneṁdaḍeḷeyo nātta tatvavi
cārapravyaktahṛdayanucitadhanavyaya vita cāru
caritada peṁpiṁ sadamaḷajinapūjā vaṁdane vasudhā
vasanakke surācaḷakke peṁpalpamenuttu yarali
kulalōluparppōlvare sādavaṁśakumuda yadhanaṁ
gīge nāgagāvuṁḍaṁgaiśvaryamanarhatsiddācāryya daḍe .
ślōka . śrīmūlasaṁghasūrastha rō .
śūrasthagaṇa viyattaḷasūra citrakūṭa vā
supūjyamunīṁdraṁ . siddhāṁtatraya siddhāṁtacakrava
rtti jagaddhavaḷitakīrtti riyaṁ . Antavara ra
nadadyaranagharśāṁtamanarṇegaḷda rāvaṇaṁdimunīṁdra ge
rāvaṇaṁdimunīṁdraṁ vinayanidhi nenanupamane ja
navinūtanupamātītaṁ bhūtaḷavinu janaguṇa vinūta
caritaṁ śiṣṭēṣṭa saṁrakṣaṇaṁ jinapādā pramōdanaṁ tātparyya śauryyavana
vardyādāyyavaṁgīkritaṁ tanageṁdaṁdu jasa mi kētagāvuṇḍanātana satige rati rundhatigava
drisutegaṁ dharaṇībhāgadoḷeṇeyoḷare kulastrī nāgagā
vuṁḍanudāttaviśadakīrttilategivaḍarppāytene goṭṭagaḍiyoḷe jenabhavanavanajanupama diḷe .
varasaudhātmāṁśuviṁ kāṁcanakaḷaśakanatkāṁtiyiṁ nīḷaratnasphuritā ccāru ruṇamaṇi tpra
bhānirbbharaśōbhābhōgadiṁ śōbhisi sakaḷajagadbhavyalakṣmīkaraṁ pāṁḍuritaṁ ritavaruṇitaruṁdra
jainēṁdragēhaṁ . dānavinōdaneṁbudu guṇauṁbudhiyeṁbudu satyaśaucadaṇmina nidhānaneṁbaduvanītaḷa
kītane tīrtthaneṁbudanmānisadīva kaḷpataruveṁbudu sādakuḷapradīpana negaḷda budhajanastutanāgagauṁ
ḍana . Adu nijapuṇyapuṁjavadu taṁna viśuddhayaśassamūhavaṁtadu ta masamu
ccayavaṁtadātmavaṁśada sucaritrasaṁstavanaśāsanaśaiḷavenippa permmegāspadanene nāga varmmavibhu māḍisidaṁ
jinarājagēhamaṁ . Anupamamahimaṁ surēṁdravinutaṁ māḍuge jinēṁdrabhadraṁ dayeyiṁ manamosedu nā
gagāvuṁḍana manadabhilaṣitaphaḷamanācaṁdrārkkaṁ dhare pogaḷe śāntira viracisidaṁ sukavi tirddi kavipa
ramātmaṁ barayisidaṁ baradaṁ sāḷvara tiḷaku sakaḷāryyanī śāsanamaṁ . © svasti śrīmat kaḷacuryya
pratāpacakravartti vīrabijjaṇadēvaru kalyāṇada nelevīḍinoḷu sukhadiṁ rājyaṁ geyvutamire tatpā
dapadmōpajīvi . sakavarṣa 1090 neya sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada caitrada puṇna mi sōmavāra
sōmagrahaṇadaṁdu Arasigāvuṁḍiyuṁ nāgagāvuṁḍanuṁ taṁma māḍisida jināla yakke biṭṭa dharmameṁteṁdaḍe
riṣiyarayvarāhāradānakkaṁ Ajjiyarāhāradānakkaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnōddhāra kkaṁ biṭṭa tōṁṭa hiriyake
ṟeya keḷage tuṁbina modalalu tōṇṭa Aḍakeya mara nālnūṟu siḍilageṟeya keḷage tuṁbiṁda keḷage gadde
mattaroṁdu . Ūriṁdaṁ baḍagalōṇiyiṁda haḍuvalu Ereyakeyi mattarumūṟu siḍilageṟe
ya teṁkaṇa kōḍiya keḷage hāḷakeyi mattaroṁdu . mūlevatta hēṟi baḷḷavoṁdu hejjuṁkada nāgaṇadē
va dēvara naṁdādīvigege tiṁgaḷiṁge biṭṭa paṇavoṁdu dēvagoḷaga dharmmagoḷagavaṁ salisuvariṁtī dharmmava nāḍa mē
lāḷkeyarasugaḷuṁ mēlāḷkeya manneyaruṁ gauṁḍanuṁ prajegaḷuṁ svadharmmadiṁ naḍe sidavaru śrīvāraṇāsi kurukṣē
travargghyatīrtthadalu sāyira kavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ hoṁnaluṁ beḷḷiyaluṁ kaṭṭisi vēdadvijargge
dānaṁ māḍida phalavaṁ paḍevarintī dharmmavanaḷidavaranitu kavileyuma(ṁ) nanibaru brāhmaṇaru
ma(ṁ)nā tīrtthaṁgaḷali koṁda pātakanappaṁ . © Ūroḍeyanakke maṁneyanūrāḷva rasakke pāpi koṁḍeyana
kkintāraḷidaḍavī dharmmavanōrantire rauravakke gaḷagaḷaniḷivaṁ © ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō ha
rēti vasuṁdharā . ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ṇamō Arahantāṇaṁ . ©
Digital edition of SII 18.180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
